title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Miss Blacklock presents a letter to Philippa, which prompts her to call Patrick and Julia downstairs to the living room. After reading the letter, Patrick realizes he should have wired his sister and admits to being part of a deception. Miss Blacklock confronts him regarding the identity of the young woman brought to the house as Julia Simmons' niece. Patrick explains that the real Julia wanted to pursue acting in Perth and had pretended to train as a pharmacist to avoid upsetting her mother.

Julia enters the room and confesses that she is actually Emma Joachim Stanfordshire, one of the duo known as "Pip and Emma." She explains that her father was a charming but unreliable man who often abandoned her at convents. After working with the French Resistance, Emma sought to secure her future by targeting Miss Blacklock, whom she believed would inherit a large fortune and had no heirs. Emma met Patrick by chance and convinced him to help her impersonate Julia. She claims she only maintained the ruse to avoid suspicion following a robbery and to keep a low profile while the investigation into the murder attempts continued. When questioned about "Pip," Emma claims she has not seen him since they were three years old. Emma asserts that she is a skilled marksman but denies attempting to kill Miss Blacklock.

The confrontation is interrupted by the arrival of the police. Mickey announces their presence, and Inspector Corrado enters looking stern. Corrado informs the group that Miss Muggleton has been murdered by strangulation within the last hour and immediately directs his suspicion toward Julia, questioning her whereabouts.
